name: VRealm Funverse – Ultimate VR Game Hub

reviews.review_description: So I was playing and I tried hitting a npc and I can’t do that so I try the physics and horrible so overall horrible game and bad just slop

developer_response.body:
Thank you for trying the game and sharing your feedback.

I'm sorry the experience didn't meet your expectations. VRealm Funverse is actively being developed, and improvements to physics, AI behavior, NPC interactions, weapons, and Sandbox Mode are ongoing with each update.

As a solo developer, I genuinely appreciate all feedback—both positive and negative—as it helps identify areas that need improvement. I hope you'll give the game another try in a future update as new features and improvements are added.

Thank you for your time. 🚀

reviews.review_description: This game is good though some stuff doesn’t work personally I love this game maybe someday it will make it to be better than gorilla tag

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you so much for the support! Really glad you’re enjoying the game 🙌

I appreciate you pointing out that some things aren’t working — improvements and fixes are already in progress. As a solo developer, I’m continuously updating and refining the experience.

And that’s an awesome goal 😄 hopefully we keep getting closer with each update!

— Rsquaregames

reviews.review_title: This game is alr I guess
reviews.review_description: Please fix guns plus make spawn gun and good NPCs like down shot and bonelab

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback — really appreciate you taking the time to share it 👍

I understand your points about the guns and NPCs. Improvements to weapons, spawning systems, and overall AI behavior are already being worked on, and upcoming updates will bring more depth and better interactions.

The goal is to keep improving step by step and make the experience more polished over time.

Thanks again for trying the game — more updates coming soon 🚀

reviews.review_description: I played for the first time and the game wasn't even finished yet

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your feedback. The current version is an early build and still actively in development, so some features may feel incomplete.

This project is being developed by a solo developer, with ongoing updates and improvements planned.

If you’d like to share what specifically felt unfinished, it would really help improve future updates. You can also reach us at studio@rsquaregames.com
.

— Rsquaregames

Hi, thanks for taking the time to leave a review. This project is currently being developed by a solo developer and is still early in development, with updates and improvements ongoing.

If you have any specific feedback on what didn’t work for you, feel free to share it or reach us at studio@rsquaregames.com
 — it would really help improve future updates.

— Rsquaregames

reviews.review_description: This game is a gem. The dev works hard so I’ll give them the stars. Keep working at it maybe you could make it to bonelab standards one day?

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words and the support ⭐
Calling it a gem genuinely means a lot, especially as this is built by a solo developer.

Comparisons to BONELAB are honestly motivating — the goal is to keep improving step by step, pushing physics, interactions, and gameplay depth with every update.

Really appreciate you taking the time to leave a review and encouragement. More updates and experiments are on the way 🚀
See you in VR!

reviews.review_description: I. Cant get. In the. Vechelis

developer_response.body: The features are in development and will be available by May end. We recommend you to wait. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: really good hidden gem of a free game
reviews.review_description: Really fun and looking forward for future updates, the physics are really smooth and the boxing gamemode is my favorite!❤️ All love and support to the creator

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words and support ❤️
I’m really glad you enjoyed VRealm Funverse and that the boxing mode stood out for you — a lot of effort went into getting the physics to feel right.

There’s a lot more planned for future updates, and feedback like yours genuinely motivates me to keep improving the experience.
Appreciate the love and support — it truly means a lot 🙏

reviews.review_description: This game is ok but if they make new updates the it will be good and make multiplayer and at least he tried so keep the good work❤️

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the honest feedback and support ❤️

I really appreciate you taking the time to leave a review. Updates are actively in development, and I’m continuously improving the experience with new features and content.

Multiplayer is definitely something I’m exploring for the future — it’s a big step, but it’s on the roadmap as the project grows.

Thanks again for the encouragement. It truly means a lot, especially as this is built by a solo developer. More updates coming soon 🚀

Hi David,
Thanks for the feedback. This is an early version of the game and is currently developed by a solo developer, with updates and improvements actively in progress.

If you’re willing to share what didn’t work for you, it would really help improve future updates. You can also reach us at studio@rsquaregames.com

— Rsquaregames

reviews.review_description: i played this game last year and it was really really bad and this year i downloaded it again if it got better but it did not it got worse it sucks did the creator like give up cuz the game is like the exact same thing i was like 100 years ago, i bet if the creator did not give up years ago this game would have been pretty good

The fist wars mini game is the best physics based game. Waiting for sandbox mode next! So hard to believe a single dev managed to pull all this off in 4 months. Can really feel the passion and creativity. Incredible potential and worth every penny. Also, hats off to the developer as he was able to design such an immersive vr experience with multiple mini games and next level vr interface single handedly!! Keep up the good work mate!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing words! 🙏
Fist Wars was a blast to build, and I’m thrilled you enjoyed it.
Sandbox Mode is dropping soon — with way more physics chaos and tools to play with!
Your support really motivates me as a solo dev. 💙🔥
